# Build & install

Ways to obtain a working Mekami binary, from the AUR, from source, or as a dev build.

<ul class="card-list">
  <li>
    <a href="from-source/"><span>:building_construction:</span> From source</a>
    <p>Clone and compile, with the <code>build.sh</code> helper.</p>
  </li>
  <li>
    <a href="aur/"><span>:package:</span> AUR packaging</a>
    <p>The <code>mekami-bin</code> and <code>mekami</code> packages, and how to bump them.</p>
  </li>
</ul>
